mapper.select: SELECT * FROM group_buy_product WHERE product_id = #{productId} ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM group_buy_product WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM group_buy_product WHERE activity_id = #{activityId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY behavior_score DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO group_buy_product (activity_id, product_id, group_buy_price, original_price, discount_rate, interested_users, target_user_tags, behavior_score, purchase_count, view_count, favorite_count, status, online_time, offline_time, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{activityId}, #{productId}, #{groupBuyPrice}, #{originalPrice}, #{discountRate}, #{interestedUsers}, #{targetUserTags}, #{behaviorScore}, #{purchaseCount}, #{viewCount}, #{favoriteCount}, #{status}, #{onlineTime}, #{offlineTime}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE group_buy_product SET group_buy_price = #{groupBuyPrice}, discount_rate = #{discountRate}, interested_users = #{interestedUsers}, target_user_tags = #{targetUserTags}, behavior_score = #{behaviorScore}, purchase_count = #{purchaseCount}, view_count = #{viewCount}, favorite_count = #{favoriteCount}, status = #{status}, online_time = #{onlineTime}, offline_time = #{offlineTime}, update_time = NOW() WHERE activity_id = #{activityId} AND product_id = #{productId}

UPDATE group_buy_product SET status = #{status}, online_time = CASE WHEN #{status} = 1 THEN NOW() ELSE online_time END, offline_time = CASE WHEN #{status} = 2 THEN NOW() ELSE offline_time END, update_time = NOW() WHERE activity_id = #{activityId} AND product_id = #{productId}
UPDATE group_buy_product SET status = 2, offline_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE status = 1 AND offline_time IS NOT NULL AND offline_time <= NOW()
